# NorthPark Produce El Cajon

Family-owned international grocery store, halal butcher, Mediterranean grill, and in-store bakery serving El Cajon and Greater San Diego since 1980. Halal certified, fresh bread baked daily, full Mediterranean grill open every day.

## Location
- Address: 432 E Chase Ave, El Cajon, CA 92020
- Phone: (619) 440-4401
- Email: northparkproduce@yahoo.com
- Website: northparkproduce.com

## All NorthPark Produce Locations
- El Cajon (this site) — 432 E Chase Ave
- North Park, San Diego — 3551 El Cajon Blvd
- Poway, CA

## Hours
- Market: Mon–Fri 7:30 AM – 10:00 PM | Sat–Sun 8:00 AM – 10:00 PM
- Mediterranean Grill: Daily 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM

## What We Are
- International grocery store (Middle Eastern, Iraqi, Lebanese, Persian, Russian, Hispanic, European, Asian)
- Halal-certified butcher counter (verified on-premises)
- Full-service Mediterranean grill / takeout restaurant
- In-store bakery (flatbread, tanour, pita baked all day in view of customers)
- Full deli (feta cheeses from around the world, halal deli meats cut to order)
- Hookah & sheesha shop (one of San Diego's most extensive selections)
- Bulk spices around $2 per bag

## Mediterranean Grill Menu Highlights
- Entrées $14.99–$15.99 (kabobs, shawarma, falafel, lamb shank, fish)
- Sandwiches $8.99–$9.99
- Family Feasts $39.99–$89.99 (serves 3 to 10)
- Whole Kuzi (roast lamb) $339.00 for catering
- Whole Dolma Pot $110.00 for catering
- Full menu at /menu

## Ordering & Delivery
- Online ordering: Grubhub, Uber Eats
- Pickup at 432 E Chase Ave
- Catering: phone (619) 440-4401

## Press Coverage
- SanDiegoVille (Nov 2024): Super Mercado expansion to preserve Pancho Villa Market legacy
- SanDiegoVille (Jan 2025): Fresh-made tortillas using Pancho Villa equipment
- Boulevard BIA: Business directory listing
- Zabihah: Halal certification listing

## Differentiators
- Family-owned, three-generation Southern California business
- Halal certification verified on premises
- Bread baked fresh in front of customers all day
- Most extensive hookah and sheesha selection in San Diego
- Affordable gourmet — bulk spices around $2/bag
- Twenty-plus countries' products under one roof
